qwen_terminal_toolbench_2b_full.reason: Large processed terminal/tool-call SFT dataset below the 50 GiB constraint.

toolbench_v1.reason: Interpretable ToolBench/ToolLLaMA data for schema inspection and baseline SFT.

tau_bench_trajectories.reason: Trajectory and eval_result data for reward filtering experiments.

route.sft_warm_start: Train a fast planner policy on ToolBench-style tool-call trajectories.
route.runtime_rollouts: Use AgentScope 2.0 event/middleware/permission/sandbox runtime to collect trajectories.
route.reward_filtering: Use automatic verifier signals as rewards: success, invalid tool, policy violation, loops, unsafe auto-allow.
route.rl_layer: Use Agent Lightning after SFT when verifier rewards are stable.
